# Voice Party

> Voice Party is a free, browser-based real-time voice chat for gaming teams.
> There is nothing to install and no account to create: enter a name and a
> shared game ID, join, and talk with your team over crystal-clear voice.
> Invite others simply by sharing the page URL. The interface is available in
> English, Japanese (日本語), and Korean (한국어).

## What it is

- A real-time, peer voice-chat web app that runs entirely in a modern browser.
- Free to use, with no download and no sign-up.
- Designed for coordinating with a small team (up to 5 participants per room).

## How it works

1. Open the app and enter your name plus a game ID (a shared passphrase — any
   value works as long as everyone uses the same one).
2. Join the game to enable your microphone and connect to everyone on the same
   game ID.
3. Share the browser URL with teammates; opening the link joins the same room.
4. Talk and coordinate with clear voice, and leave anytime with one click.

## Key features

- No install and no account required — open and talk instantly.
- Clear, low-noise real-time voice with one-tap mute.
- Invite by link: share the game ID URL to gather your team.
- Low latency from anywhere, backed by a globally distributed network.
- Multilingual UI: English, 日本語, 한국어.

## Pages

- Home / landing (usage guide): https://voiceparty.lol/
- Join a voice room: https://voiceparty.lol/join

## Notes

- Voice Party is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by,
  or sponsored by Riot Games.
